# owner_pubkey_hex/reponame — repos on Hetzner bridge with ≥1 commit from gittr HTTP push
# Detection: git log --all --author=push@gittr.space (see ui/src/pages/api/nostr/repo/push.ts)
# Not included: SSH-only pushes, bridge clones from GitHub with no gittr UI push, etc.
# Regenerate: on bridge host, run scripts/scan-gittr-http-pushed-repos.sh (as git-nostr)
